title: Huawei 10G SFP+ optical transceiver, SM, 1550nm, 40km, 2x LC, DDM
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: Huawei OSX040N01 is a single-mode 10G SFP+ module with a wavelength of 1550nm and two LC connectors for a connection distance of up to 40km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
